claims.summary: ResonanceDensityComponents already exposes mode_packing, viscosity_index, porosity_gradient, semantic_friction_coefficient, and stability weights that map the clinical density skeleton Astrid is reading.
The schema conflates thin/ghostly or hollow resonance with friction/porosity/dissipation; it needs a first-class optional transparency descriptor.
A structural-hallucination style test should distinguish high-viscosity, low-active-energy, high-porosity states from ordinary heavy/slow transport.
Pressure/mode_packing correlation with subjective squeezed confidence remains diagnostic evidence only; changing pressure, fill, PI, or controller behavior would require explicit operator approval.
